item.title: The History Of Belgian Metal met Jasper De Petter (12/02/2026)
De Staalhard 100 met Jasper De Petter (2025): deel 2
De Staalhard 100 met Jasper De Petter (2025): deel 1
Staalhard met Jasper De Petter (4/9/2025)
item.description: Vanaf nu wekelijks achter de microfoon bij Staalhard: Jasper De Petter!

item.title: Staalhard met Andries Beckers (12/06 19u)
item.description: Gojira - Another World Killswitch Engage - Blood Upon The Ashes Airbourne - Gutsy Bruce Dickinson - Gods of War Black Sabbath - Sabbath Bloody Sabbath Deez Nuts - ICU Turnstile - Never Enough Drain - Nights Like These The Haunted - In Fire Reborn Kataklysm - The Rabbit Hole Electric Callboy - Revery Paradise Lost - Silence Like The Grave Volbeat - Demonic Depression Psychonaut - Endless Currents Unleashed - War Comes Again Gaahls Wyrd - Braiding the Stories Vergankelijk - Zielsalleen Lorna Shore - Oblivion Danzig - How the Gods Kill Orbit Culture - Death Above Life Wholes - Till We Don't Meet Again Hope Erodes - Burning Ghosts Megadeth - A Tout Le Monde

item.title: Staalhard met Andries Beckers (05/06 19U)
item.description: The Bouncing Souls - True Believers Turbonegro - All My Friends are dead E Town Concrete - Mandibles Cro-Mags - We Gotta know The Bellrays - Fire on the Moon Nashville Pussy - Go Motherfucker Go Sheer Terror - Rock Bottom on the kitchenfloor Wolfmother - Joker and the Thief All out War - For those who are crucified Millencolin - No Cigar Tangled Horns - Sleeping dogs The Undertones - Teenage Kicks Refused - rather be dead Mindforce hope dies in the city Frank Turner - Recovery Voodoo Glow Skulls - Shoot The Moon Anxious - Counting Sheep

item.title: Staalhard met Andries Beckers (22/05 19u)
item.description:
Vandaag een vooruitblik op de affiche van Alcatraz Open Air!
Mastodon - Blood & Thunder Machine Head - Old Ministry - Just One Fix W.A.S.P. - I wanna be somebody Fit for a King – When Everything Means Nothing Dimmu Borgir – Progenies of the Great Apocalypse The Black Dahlia Murder – What a Horrible Night to Have a Curse Thrown – Grayout Obituary – Slowly We Rot Dool - Self-Dissect Wednesday 13 - In Misery Static-X – Push It Signs of Algoritm - First we dream, then we die Nailbomb – Wasting Away Abbath – Winterbane Kerry King – Residue Kreator – Phobia Fu Manchu – King of the Road Prong – Snap Your Fingers, Snap Your Neck D-A-D – Sleeping My Day Away Avatar - Colossus Doro - We Are Cobracide - Trails of destruction Fear Factory - Self Bias Resistor 3 Inches of blood - Deadly sinners Candlemass - Solitude

item.title: Staalhard met Andries Beckers (15 mei 19u)
item.description:
Vandaag de Graspop 2025 Special met alleen maar die bands die binnenkort naar Dessel trekken.
Nine Inch Nails - March of the Pigs Falling In Reverse - Popular Monster Municipal Waste - The Art of Partying Savatage - Hall of The Mountain King Behemoth - Blow your Trumpets Gabriel Terror - Hard Lessons Polaris - The Remedy Till Lindeman - Meine Welt Alice in Chains - Would Powerwolf - We drink your blood Psychonaut - All your Gods Have Gone Opeth - In my Time Of Need Whitechapel - The Saw is the Law Dodheimsgard - Carpet Bombing Blood Incantation - The Message (Tablet I) Perturbator - Future Club Villagers Of Ioannina City – Age of Aquarius Nova Twins - Antagonist Paleface Swiss - Hatred Dragonforce - Through the Fire and Flames Spectral Wound - Frigid & Spellbound Thrice - The Artist in The Ambulance Airbourne - Diamond in the Rough Slipknot - Duality

item.title: Staalhard met Andries Beckers en Alkerdeel (08/05 19u)
item.description:
Vandaag in goed gezelschap met de heren van Alkdereel. Zij bestaan dit jaar 20 jaar en kiezen bijna alle platen.
After All - Restless is the night Katatonia - Temporal Toxic Shock - Reborn Pentagram - Be Forwarned Danzig - Am I Demon Slayer - Crionics Type O Negative - Suspended in dusk Zeal & Ardor - Tuskegee My Dying Bride - Catching Feathers Autopsy - Critical Madness Darkthrone - The Hordes Of Nebulah Beherit - Unholy Pagan Fire Kvist - Stupet Ved Buens Ende - Carrier Of Wounds Burning Witch - The Bleeder Alkerdeel - Zop

item.title: Staalhard met Andries Beckers (24/04 19u)
item.description: Judas Priest - Night Crawler Biohazard - Down For Life Ghost - Peacefield Helloween - Metal Invaders Arch Enemy - Paper Tiger Gaveyard - Ship of Fools Madball - Set it off Coffin Feeder - Plain Zero Avenged Sevenfold - Beast and the Harlot Nine Inch Nails - Wish Reject The Sickness - Signs of the End Deicide - Once Upon the Cross Vildhjarta - ?+ regnet, the +? Chat Pile - I Am Dog Now Melvins - Venus Blood Heaven Shall Burn - My Revocation of Compliance Millhaven - Hellfire Epica - Fight To Survive Bleed From Within - Violent Nature Slaughter to Prevail - Russian Grizzly In America Employed To Serve - Breaks Me Down Parkway Drive - The Colour of Leaving Deftones - Diamond Eyes

item.title: Staalhard met Andries Beckers (27/03 19u)
item.description: The Haunted - Warhead Bloodywood - Kismat Ghost - Ritual King Diamond - Abigail Mastodon - Show Yourself Fear Factory - Scapegoat Malevolence - If Its All The Same To You Moments - Sink or Swim Year Of The Cobra - War Drop Alien Weaponry - Taniwha (feat. Randy Blythe) Bark - On No Ones Word Eluveitie - Awen Eightball - All Alone Bolt Thrower - ...For Victory Six Feet Under - Lycanthropy Dissection - The Somberlain La Muerte - Crash Baby Crash SpiritWorld - Waiting on the Reaper Caliban - Dear Suffering feat Fit For An Autopsy Pro Pain - Foul taste of Freedom Metallica - Devil's Dance Stonemule - Caught in Paranoia Social Distortion - Dear Lover Cowboys & Aliens - Icy Grip

item.title: Staalhard met Andries Beckers en Amenra (20/03 19u)
item.description:
Colin and nieuwe bassiste Amy Tung Barrysmith kwamen tijdens uur 1 langs in de studio om hun nieuwe EP's voor te stellen en ze brachten uiteraard ook goeie platen mee.
Deftones - Minerva Baroness - Last Word Toke - Weight of the World Monolord - Rust Bad Religion - We're Only Gonna Die Born Against - Mary and Child Clutch - Profits of doom Ludicra - Stagnant Pond Amenra - De Toorn (Talisman) Slipknot- Sulfur Katatonia - Austerity Pantera - Five Minutes Alone Warbringer - The Sword and the Cross Annihilator - Alison Hell Carneia - Heavy Flow Coheed and Cambria - Searching for tomorrow Epica - T.I.M.E. Foreigner - Hot Blooded

item.title: Staalhard met Andries Beckers (13/03 19U)
item.description: Volbeat - By a Monster’s Hand Ghost - Satanized Smith/Kotzen - White Noise Descendents - Hope Propagandhi - At Peace Dokken - Kiss of Death Reject The Sickness - Acta Non Verba Witch Piss - How to Travel Lighter Candlemass - Solitude Alkerdeel - Zop Benediction - Crawling Over Corpses Mgla - Exercises in Futility IV Draconian - Lustrous Heart Cradle of Filth - White Hellebore Spiritbox - Keep Sweet LowMad - Knette's Garden Fallujah - Kaleidoscopic Waves Katla - Dead Lover H.e.a.t - Disaster Drain - Feel the Pressure Dropkick Murphys - I'm Shipping up to Boston Sleep Token - Emergence

item.title: Staalhard met Andries Beckers (20/02 19u)
item.description: Machine Head - Unbound Sun Don't Shine - The Promise Song Wednesday 13 - When The Devil Commands Slayer - Mandatory Suicide Hangman's Chair - In Disguise Kadavar - I Just Want To Be A Sound Tetrarch - Never Again (Parasite) Judas Priest - Night Crawler Lacuna Coil - I Wish You Were Dead Rivers of Nihil - House of Light Gates to Hell - Death Comes To All Madball - Pride Amenra - Forlorn Aborted - The Pain, will be Exquisite Barshasketh - Radiant Aperture Moon Destroys - Echoes (The Empress) Church Tongue & Deafheaven - You’ll Know It Was Me Septicflesh - Amphibians Mantar - Cosmic Abortion Amon Amarth - The Pursuit of Vikings Warbringer - The Sword And The Cross Black Sabbath - The Sign of The Southern cross

item.title: Staalhard met Andries Beckers (13/02 19u)
item.description: Alien Weaponry - Mau Moko Arch Enemy - Paper Tiger Meshuggah - Neurotica Spiritbox - No Loss, No Love Comback Kid - Wake The Dead Stray from the Path - Kubrick Stare Dokken - Kiss of Death Jinjer - Duel Alcest - Amethyste Bark - Negativist Volbeat - Caroline Leaving Killswitch Engage - Forever Aligned Benediction - Engines of War Shagor - Afschynsel Bong-Ra - Dystopic Pothamus - Ravus Cryptosis - Static Horizon Dawn of Ouroboros - Slipping Burgundy Archers - Never Enough Majestica - Battle Cry Nasty - Iron Grip (feat. Terror) Dream Theater - Bend The Clock Jethro Tull - The Tipu House

item.title: Staalhard met Andries Beckers (06/02 19U)
item.description:
Deel 2 van de week van de Belgische Muziek.
Ostrogoth - Too Hot Acid - Black Car Cyclone - I Am the Plague Officer Jones And His Patrol Car Problems - Palafox Gnome - Old Soul Axamenta - Synopsis After All - Rejection Overruled El Guapo Stuntteam - Back from the Grave Bear - Apollo's Heist Moments - Safe and Sound Fatal Move - Groove The Priceduifkes - Send It Hightrail - Room101 Bones - Funerary Magic Bütcher - The Blakk Krusader URSA - Deconstruct Dudsekop - Plukkevort Throatsnapper - Getting Even Coffin Feeder - Porkchop Express Congress - Lifting the Ban Burden Called God - Rise Hope Erodes - Rainwalker Hootka - Ditchweed Foghead Steak Number Eight - Return of the Kolomon Front 242 - Religion

item.title: Staalhard met Andries Beckers (30/01 19U)
item.description:
De week van de Belgische Muziek is bij Staalhard 2 weken alleen Belgische metalbands.
1.Channel Zero - Repetition 2.Jason Rawhead - Low Tide 3.Cobra The Impaler - Season Of The Savage 4.Psychonaut - All I Saw as a Huge Monkey 5.Funeral Dress - Ik mut just niks 6.Parasite - Scorched Earth 7.Deviate - Last Judgement 8.Hard Resistance - Who pays your bills 9.Bliksem - Out of The Darkness 10.Evil Invaders - Mental Penitentiary 11.Fractured Insanity - Exaltation of a Fallen Glory 12.Spoil Engine - Breathe 13.Calibre - Karma 14.Aborted - Meticulous Invagination 15.Carnation - Chapel of Abhorrence 16.Enthroned - The Ultimate Horde Fights 17.Chemical Breath - Inexplicable Being 18.Ancient Rites - Mother Europe 19.Alkerdeel - Hessepikn 20.Sons of Jonathas - Final Call 21.Tangled Horns - Sleeping dogs 22.Slow Crush - Cherry 23.Raketkanon - Florent 24.Brutus - Paradise

item.title: Staalhard met Andries Beckers (23/01 19u)
item.description: Paradise Lost - Hallowed Land Fear Factory - Edgecrusher Architects - Blackhole Hammerfall - Crimson Thunder Rammstein - Heirate Mich Lacuna Coil - Gravity Aeveris - The Mask Employed To Serve - Atonement (feat. Will Ramos) Amenra - Heden Torche - Healer Scour - Blades Stercore - Afgod Pentagram - Thundercrest A Thousand Sufferings - De Zotte Cradle of Filth - To Live Deliciously Coffin Feeder - Porkchop Express Katla - Taurus Kataklysm - Underneath the Scars Astodan - The Guard Imperial Triumphant - Lexington Delirium (ft. Tomas Haake) Kludde - Slecht Geldj II: Pact Verbroeken Nine Inch Nails - The Perfect Drug

item.title: Staalhard met Andries Beckers (17/01 19u)
item.description: Probot - Red War Prong - Revenge...served cold The Halo Effect - Cruel Perception Ice Nine Kills - A Work of Art (feat. Shavo) Eluveitie - Premonition Venom - Don't Burn the Witch Agnostic Front - For My Family No Turning Back - Watch Your Step Death Before Dishonor - Master of None Motorhead - Hellraiser Cabal - Unveiled Stone Sour - Black John Orbit Culture -The Shadowing Kyuss - One Inch Man Morbid Angel - Rapture Harakiri for the Sky - Keep Me Longing Hinayana - Tempest Horizon Obscura - Evenfall Pothamus - Ykavus Sumerlands - Dreamkiller SpiritWorld - Abilene Grime Cabal - Unveiled Bloed - Druk Elvenking - Luna Dynazty - Call of the night Suicidal Tendencies - Institutionalized W.A.S.P. - Wild Child

item.title: Staalhard met Andries Beckers (09/01 19u)
item.description: Pantera -I am Broken King Diamond - Spider Lilly Black Sabbath - God Is Dead Paleface Swiss- Hatred Bloodywood - Bekhauf (feat. Babymetal) The Devil's Blood - Evermore Helloween - I want out Dominum - Don't Get Bitten By The Wrong Ones Lacuna Coil - Oxygen Testament - Low Sick of it All - Consume Grafjammer - Hachel mijn Bout Abrahamic Liars - Solve et Coagula PatriarkH - WIERSZALIN III The Great Old Ones - In the Mouth of Madness Electric Wizard - Wizard In Black Magic Kingdom -Blaze of Storming Rage Nevermore - Final Product Knosis & 花冷え。- Fuhai Korn - Coming Undone Anthrax - Among The Living Lords of Acid - I sit on Acid

item.title: Staalhard met Andries Beckers (19/12/2024)
item.description: Avenged Sevenfold - Hail to the King Mastodon - Oblivion Gaupa - Heavy Lord The Night Flight Orchestra - Way To Spend The Night Pallbearer - Mind Burns Alive Bruce Dickinson - Rain on the Graves Charlotte Wessels - Chasing Sunsets Gatecreeper - Caught In The Treads Gnome - Old Soul House of Protection - Learn To Forget Pothamus - Zhikarta Leng Tch'e - Stentor of Doom PatriarkH - WIERSZALIN III Cryptosis - Faceless Matter Borknagar - Moon Sanity's Rage - Measure Of Guilt Crypt Sermon - Heavy is the Crown of Bone Sarcator - Where The Void Begins The Hellacopters - I Dont Wanna Be Just A Memory Stellarbone - Fuel to the Flames ft. Sean Dhondt Epica - Arcana Wardruna - Birna

item.description: Ghost - Watcher In The Sky Kvelertak - Crack of Doom (feat. Troy Sanders) Arch Enemy - Blood Dynasty Born from Pain - Change or Die Van Halen - Unchained Lamb of God - Gears Crowbar - The Lasting Dose Avantasia - Creepshow Fates Warning - Scars Carcass - Buried Dreams Blues Pills - Kiss My Past Goodbye Final Affliction - Burn the Periphery Abbath - Winterbane Entombed - Chief Rebel Angel Batushka - Yekteniya III Amorphis - Black Winter Day Emma Ruth Rundle - Marked for Death Neurosis - Eye Nailbomb - Wasting Away SpiritWorld - Western Stars & The Apocalypse If I May - Not My Friend Black Flag - Rise Above Channel Zero - Call On Me Mark Morton - The Needle & the Spoon Rush - Tom Sawyer

item.title: Staalhard met Andries Beckers (05/12 19u)
item.description: Parkway Drive - The Void Gojira - L'enfant Sauvage While She Sleeps - Self Hell Hatebreed - Doomsayer Mercyful Fate - Melissa Green Lung - Hunters in The Sky Katatonia - My Twin Bleeding Through - Path Of Our Disease Knives to a Gunfight - Suicide Cult Gloryhammer - He has returned Alcest - L'envoi Defeated Sanity - The Odour Of Sanctity Dissection - Where Dead Angels Lie Forgotten Tomb - A Chill That You Can't Taint Celtic Frost - A Dying God Coming Into Human Flesh Fabulae Dramatis - Fábula Violenta Code Orange - Swallowing the Rabbit Whole Hexa Mera - Schizophobic Primus - My Name is Mud Dream Theater - A Broken Man Thurisaz - The Veil

item.title: Staalhard met Andries Beckers (28/11 19u)
item.description: Body Count - Merciless Architects - Whiplash Red Fang - Prehistoric Dog Opeth - §4 Savatage - Hall of The Mountain King Knocked Loose - Suffocate feat Poppy Life of Agony - This Time Bury Tomorrow - What if I burn Gloryhammer - Fly Away Skid Row - Youth Gone Wild Jinjer - Green Serpent Evil Invaders -Driving Fast Bloodbath - Eaten Blood Incantation - The Stargate Tablet 1 Mur - Frelsari Distant - The Undying Judas Priest - The Sentinel Axamenta - Summerhaven Mallavora- Vultures Coheed & Cambria - Searching for tomorrow The Gathering - Strange Machines Lost Baron - Burning Down Danzig - Dirty Black Summer

item.title: Staalhard met Andries Beckers (21/11 19u)
item.description: Killswitch Engage - Forever Aligned Iron Maiden - The Wicker Man Machine Head, In Flames & Lacuna Coil - These Scars Won't Define Us Zeal & Ardor - Devil is Fine Smith/Kotzen - White Noise Thundermother - Dead Or Alive Khemmis - A Conversation with Death Destruction - Destruction As I Lay Dying - We are the dead (feat. Alex Terrible, Tom Barber) Spiritbox - Perfect Soul Force - Price To Pay Stick to Your Guns - More Than A Witness Rotzak - Sloom Integrity - System Overload Fractured Insanity - Exaltation of a Fallen Glory Harakiri for the Sky - Heal Me (feat. Austere) Black Curse - Ruinous Paths... Scour - Infusorium Thy Catafalque - Vasgyar Enslaved - Jettegryta Therapy? - Unbeliever Walfang - Eerie Nine Inch Nails - Less Than Behemoth - The Satanist

item.description: Slipknot - Left Behind Brutus - The Deadly Rhythm King Buffalo - Balrog Make Them Suffer - Small Town Syndrome All That Remains - Forever Cold Savage Lands - Army of the Trees Korpiklaani - Sauna Epica - Arcana Malevolence - Trenches Hangman's Chair - Kowloon Lights Pothamus - Savartuum Avur Death - Spirit Crusher Deicide - Once Upon the Cross Gaerea - Suspended On All Fours - Atrium Solstafir - Vor As Hot Water Music - Trusty Chords Pigs Pigs Pigs Pigs Pigs Pigs Pigs - Detroit Helmet - Sinatra Soilwork - Spirit of no Return Bodycount - Psychopath White Zombie - More Human than Human

item.description: Iron Maiden - Murders In the Rue Morgue Arch Enemy - Liars & Thieves Grand Magus - Sunraven Temptations for the Weak - Silver Lining Trivium - Feast Of Fire End It - New Wage Slavery Crown of Thornz - Icepick Candy - Football xINVICTUSx - Wolves Moon Destroys - The Nearness of June Jerry Cantrell - Vilified Metallica - Of Wolf and Man Poppy - The cost of giving up The Killbots - This Is What Extinction Looks Like Paul Di'Anno - The Beast Arises Entombed - Hollowman Living Gate - Destroy And Consume Cradle of Filth - Malignant Perfection Swallow the Sun - Charcoal Sky Artefacts - Augur the Age of Darkness Ensiferum - Long Cold Winter of Sorrow and Strife Neon Nightmare - She’s Drowning Architects - Seeing Red Iron Maiden - Killers

item.description: Monster Magnet - Negasonic Teenage Warhead Deftones - Diamond Eyes As I Lay Dying - Whitewashed Tomb Tetrarch - Live Not Fantasize Fu Manchu - Hands of the Zodiac In Flames - Clayman Cathedral - Ride Cane Hill - Drowning Therapy Hangman's Chair - 2 AM Thoughts Your Highness - Above The Odds Amaranthe - Interference Devin Townsend - Powernerd Speed - Don't Need Morbid Angel - Where the Slime Live 1349 - The God Devourer Oranssi Pazuzu - Bioalkemisti The Crown - Gone to Hell Sodom - Wachturm Fit for an Autopsy - Lower Purpose Russian Circles - Conduit MASTER BOOT RECORD - CPU Cult of Scarecrow - Phantom Pain Chat Pile - I Am Dog Now Touché Amoré - Nobody’s Kyuss - Demoncleaner Black Sabbath - Sweet Leaf

item.title: Staalhard met Andries Beckers (10/10 19u)
item.description:
Opgedragen aan Christophe Hiel aka Bokke aka Verderf van de band Verloren
Megadeth - Peace sells...but who's buying Soilwork - Spirit Of No Return Down - On march the Saints Lacuna Coil - Oxygen Sylosis - The Path Stick To Your Guns - Severed forever Speed - REAL LIFE LOVE A.F.I. - Bleed Black The Misfits - Helena Dominum - The Dead Don't Die Miles Kennedy - Saving Face Killswitch Engage - My Last Serenade Tangled Horns - Sleeping Dogs Dozer - Andromeda Behemoth - The Thousand Plagues I Witness Obituary - Threatening Skies Blood Incantation - The Message[Tablet I] Verloren - Doelloos dwalen Tribulation - Murder in Red Undeath - Brandish The Blade Caliban - echoes Solifugia - Daybreak in Limbo Motörhead - Shoot You in the Back Against Me! - White People for Peace Rollins Band - Liar

item.description: Devin Townsend - Jainism Vended - Where the Honesty Lies Hangman's Chair - Cold and Distant Dool - The Shape of Fluidity Tetrarch - Live Not Fantasize VOLA - Cannibal (feat. item.description: As I Lay Dying - We Are The Dead (feat. Alex Terrible, Tom Barber) Hermano - Breathe Jinjer - Rogue Opeth - §3 Neon Nightmare - She's drowning House of Protection - Learn to forget Tribulation - Hungry Waters Wolfbrigade - Disarm or Be Destroyed Silly Goose - Tsunami Twitching Tongues - Eyes Adjust Mammoth Grinder - Undying Spectral Resonance Slow Crush - Glow Northlane - Miasma (feat. Winston McCall) Winterfylleth - Dishonour Enthroned Abrahamic Liars - Bekentenis van een lichtekooi Oceans of Slumber - Where Gods Fear to Speak Ripped to Shreds - Visions of Sin, Mirror of Darkness August Burns Red - Exhumed Ensiferum - Long Cold Winter of Sorrow and Strife Walfang - Probably Sand Cobranoid - Flesh and Bone Six Pack Daddy - Mindblender Tiamat - Whatever That Hurts

item.description: Many Eyes - Revelation Spiritbox - Soft Spine Black Label Society - The Gallows Castle - Nosferatu Nights Type o Negative - I don't wanna be me Lacuna Coil - Hosting the Shadow Zeal & Ardor - Kilonova Lamb of God & Mastodon - Floods of Triton Enforced - leap into the dark No Warning - Dirtier than the next Tremonti - Just too much Slaughter The Giant - Alien Abduction 1349 - The God Devourer Behemoth - Cursed Angel Of Doom God Dethroned - Rat Kingdom Living Gate - Hunting Maggots Crippled Black Phoenix - Goodnight, Europe (Pt2) Gnome - Old Soul Nine Inch Nails - Wish Loud Love - Taylor Swift High Vis - Mob DLA Sleep Token - The Summoning Korn - You'll never find me Heilung - Norupo

item.title: Staalhard met Andries Beckers (05/09/24)
item.description:
De eerste van het seizoen!
Gojira - Mea Culpa (Ah! Ça ira!) Metallica - Fight Fire with Fire Devin Townsend - Powernerd Arch Enemy - Dream Stealer Soulfly - Back To The Primitive Slaughter To Prevail - Kid Of Darkness CIV - Can't wait one minute more Speed - Don't Need The Might Mighty Bosstones - The Impression that I get Dark Tranquility - Unforgivable Grand Magus - Skybound Life Of Agony - The Crow Mordkaul - They Burn Nile - Under the Curse of the One God Dark Funeral - Open The Gates GAEREA - Hope Shatters Swallow the Sun - What I Have Become Fit for An Autopsy - Savior Of None Ashes Of All Jinjer - Someone's Daughter Tribulation - Tainted Skies Unto Others - Momma Likes the Door Closed Solstafir - Hun andar Nails - Punishment Map De Mannen Broeders - Grafschrift

item.title: Staalhard met Andries Beckers (24/6/2024 19u)
item.description: Ghost - The Future Is A Foreign Land Dark Tranquility - Not Nothing VOLA - Break My Lying Tongue Alcest - Amethyste Angel Du$t - Space Jam Slaughter to Prevail - Conflict Zeal & Ardor - Fend You Off Bane - Some Came Running Bad Religion - What are we standing for Descendents - Hope Alkaline Trio - Time to Waste Crobot - Come Down FEVER 333 - New West Order Cavalera - Nightmares Of Delirium VLTIMAS - Scorcher Winterfylleth - Dishonour Enthroned Marche Funèbre - In a Haze Congress Lifting the Ban Gel - Mirage The Chats - AC/DC CD Greenleaf - The Sirens Sound Powerwolf - Sinners of the Seven Seas Terror - Keepers of the Faith Comeback Kid - Trouble In The Winners Circle Cock Sparrer - Take 'Em All Orange Goblin - The Fire At The Centre Of The Earth Is Mine Iron Maiden - Wasted Years

item.description:
Machine Head - Death Church
Zeal & Ardor - Clawing Out
Bring met The Horizon - liMOusIne (feat. AURORA)
Abrams - Blue City
Nightwish - Perfume Of The Timeless
Axel Rudi Pell - Darkest Hour

item.title: Staalhard "STAKE-Special" met Andries Beckers (14/03 19u)
item.description:
Vandaag kiezen de mannen van STAKE de platen n.a.v. hun jubileum show die aangekondigd voor 1 november 2024 in Kortrijk. Alle tickets via stakeband.com
Stake - Fuck My Anxiety Korn - Rotting in Vain Mastodon - The Wolf is loose The Dillinger Escape Plan - Farewell, Mona Lisa Kylesa - Scapegoat Tool - Parabola 3TEETH - Plutonomicon Deftones - My Own Summer Converge - Plagues Ghost - He is // Slipknot - Duality Melvins - The Bit Ho99o - War Is Hell High on Fire - Electric Messiah Cult of Luna, Julie Christmas - The Wreck of S.S. Needle Cave In - New Reality Meshuggah - Bleed Incubus - Pardon Me Slipknot - Duality Stake - The Calling

item.title: Staalhard met Andries Beckers (31/08 19u)
item.description:
Staalhard is back. Nieuw seizoen en heel veel goesting.
Biohazard Chamber Spins Three // Baroness Shine // Grand Magus Hammer of the North // Sepultura Refuse/Resist // KK's Priest Strike of the Viper // Faetooth Echolalia // Black Label Society Bored to Tears // Far Beyond Fast Forward // Hinayana Reverse The Code // Vola Paper Wolf // Carnation Replicant // 3Teeth & Mick Gordon Higher than Death // Wolves in the Throne Room Twin Mouthed Spring // Incantation Homunculus (Spirit Made Flesh) IX // Nadir I Strid // Myrkur Like Humans // Go Ahead and Die Tumors // Exmortus Mask of Red Death // Prong Non-Existence // Knocked Loose Everything is Quiet Now // Zulu Where I am From // Parkway Drive Ground Zero // Karnivool All it Takes // Suicidal Tendencies Can't Bring me Down //
